creator: serhii.laskavyi@gmail.com
text:
Dear Beat,
Thank you, with 3.1.4 port from
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-emulation/2010-March/007542.html
I can't reproduce kernel panic on RELENG_8 i386.

Also I do not see any problems after 2 hours of new VirtualBox (GUI)
testing (installing, booting, running, saving and restoring my test
systems).
